message:
feat(core): wire repair flush lifecycle into OpenFs commit paths

Add RepairFlushLifecycle integration to OpenFs per spec §12.1.3:

- Add repair_flush_lifecycle field to OpenFs struct
- Add attach_repair_flush_lifecycle() and has_repair_flush_lifecycle()
- Hook commit_transaction, commit_transaction_ssi, and
  commit_transaction_journaled to notify the lifecycle with committed
  block numbers
- Re-export RepairFlushLifecycle from ffs-core for convenient wiring

The repair lifecycle receives the set of committed blocks, allowing
QueuedRepairRefresh to mark the corresponding groups as dirty and
queue repair symbol refresh asynchronously.

Closes bd-w0pr

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
